data.body:
Done. Moved rebar writable-state defaults .claude/ -> .rebar/: scratch base in ticket-lib.sh (_scratch helpers used by scratch set/get), ticket-scratch-clear.sh, and the ticket_reads.py fallback read; migration stamps in ticket-migrate-{closure-checks,file-impact}-v1.sh -> .rebar/. Updated the asserting migration tests and all doc-comments. SCRATCH_BASE_DIR override preserved. README now documents the .rebar/scratch default + override. No old-path fallback added (clean break). Also migrated the next-batch dir_roots heuristic .claude -> .rebar.

DOCUMENTED RESIDUE: one .claude literal remains in src — ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh:53, the legacy plugin-source-repo guard checking $_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-plugin/plugin.json. That manifest no longer exists anywhere in standalone rebar, so the guard is inert (can never fire). Left as-is: it is not a writable-state path and rewriting the migration guard's self-skip logic is beyond this path-migration story (candidate for dedicated dso-residue cleanup). Functional smoke confirmed scratch now writes/reads under .rebar/scratch with no .claude created. Full suite green (1311).
